'''鈭歠-t-d''' ('''kafatad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yeme|yeme]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-t-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yeme|yeme]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-t-d
|-
! Lemma
| kafatad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifatad|thifatad]] || [[word:jifatad|jifatad]] || [[word:shifatad|shifatad]] || [[word:kifatad|kifatad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufatad|thuthufatad]] || [[word:jujufatad|jujufatad]] || [[word:shushufatad|shushufatad]] || [[word:kukufatad|kukufatad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufatad|thufatad]] || [[word:jufatad|jufatad]] || [[word:shufatad|shufatad]] || [[word:kufatad|kufatad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufatad|thufatad]] || [[word:jufatad|jufatad]] || [[word:shufatad|shufatad]] || [[word:kufatad|kufatad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefatad|thefatad]] || [[word:jefatad|jefatad]] || [[word:shefatad|shefatad]] || [[word:kefatad|kefatad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofatad|thothofatad]] || [[word:jojofatad|jojofatad]] || [[word:shoshofatad|shoshofatad]] || [[word:kokofatad|kokofatad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofatad|thofatad]] || [[word:jofatad|jofatad]] || [[word:shofatad|shofatad]] || [[word:kofatad|kofatad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofatad|thofatad]] || [[word:jofatad|jofatad]] || [[word:shofatad|shofatad]] || [[word:kofatad|kofatad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fatad|fatad]] || [[word:fatad|fatad]] || [[word:fatad|fatad]] || [[word:fatad|fatad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fatad|fatad]] || [[word:fatad|fatad]] || [[word:fatad|fatad]] || [[word:fatad|fatad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fatad|fatad]] || [[word:fatad|fatad]] || [[word:fatad|fatad]] || [[word:fatad|fatad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fatad|fatad]] || [[word:fatad|fatad]] || [[word:fatad|fatad]] || [[word:fatad|fatad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fatad|th忙fatad]] || [[word:j忙fatad|j忙fatad]] || [[word:sh忙fatad|sh忙fatad]] || [[word:k忙fatad|k忙fatad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafatad|thathafatad]] || [[word:jajafatad|jajafatad]] || [[word:shashafatad|shashafatad]] || [[word:kakafatad|kakafatad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafatad|thafatad]] || [[word:jafatad|jafatad]] || [[word:shafatad|shafatad]] || [[word:kafatad|kafatad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafatad|thafatad]] || [[word:jafatad|jafatad]] || [[word:shafatad|shafatad]] || [[word:kafatad|kafatad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafatad|shafatad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafatad|goshafatad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafatad|gokishafatad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafatadn眉|shafatadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafatadnkn眉|goshafatadnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafatadn眉|gokishafatadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafatadsh毛|shafatadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafatadnksh毛|goshafatadnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafatadsh毛|gokishafatadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafatadro|shafatadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafatadnkro|goshafatadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafatadro|gokishafatadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafatadmu|shafatadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafatadnkmu|goshafatadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafatadmu|gokishafatadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafatadsher|shafatadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafatadnksher|goshafatadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafatadsher|gokishafatadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafatadng|shafatadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafatadnkng|goshafatadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafatadng|gokishafatadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafatadya|shafatadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafatadnkya|goshafatadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafatadya|gokishafatadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafatadyam|shafatadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafatadnkyam|goshafatadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafatadyam|gokishafatadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafatadn眉sh毛|shafatadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafatadnkn眉sh毛|goshafatadnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafatadn眉sh毛|gokishafatadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafatadn眉ro|shafatadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafatadnkn眉ro|goshafatadnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafatadn眉ro|gokishafatadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafatadn眉mu|shafatadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafatadnkn眉mu|goshafatadnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafatadn眉mu|gokishafatadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafatadsh毛n眉|shafatadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafatadnksh毛n眉|goshafatadnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafatadsh毛n眉|gokishafatadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafatadsh毛ro|shafatadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafatadnksh毛ro|goshafatadnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafatadsh毛ro|gokishafatadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafatadsh毛mu|shafatadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafatadnksh毛mu|goshafatadnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafatadsh毛mu|gokishafatadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafatadron眉|shafatadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafatadnkron眉|goshafatadnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafatadron眉|gokishafatadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafatadrosh毛|shafatadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafatadnkrosh毛|goshafatadnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafatadrosh毛|gokishafatadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafatadromu|shafatadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafatadnkromu|goshafatadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafatadromu|gokishafatadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafatadmun眉|shafatadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafatadnkmun眉|goshafatadnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafatadmun眉|gokishafatadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafatadmush毛|shafatadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafatadnkmush毛|goshafatadnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafatadmush毛|gokishafatadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafatadmuro|shafatadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafatadnkmuro|goshafatadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafatadmuro|gokishafatadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
